name: Sonic The Hedgehog RPG [V-1.79]
description:
Looks like things are different now...Can you keep up?

Yep...Let's be real, I did Mario which I am still going to update but I wanted to take a break from bot making since I've been going at it 3 days straight for right now with a BOT I haven't released because I'm not sure if it's the quality you guys deserve

Anyway If you saw my last RPG Bot it's the same here...No MC Energy sonic(Still my goat) Only because I want to put people in the front seat for this one HOWEVER, if enough people request for him to come back I will...and Ik what your thinking...If sonic isn't here then what about Metal sonic...Oh you'll see :)


This bot is mainly IDW Focus however if I Can my goal is too fit ALL the sonic madness into one...but I don't think janitor can handle that but we'll see...anyway Hope you enjoy the ride and remember...Gotta go fast!

Zones(All locations have way more built into them, since Zones are ENTIRE universes):

Mobius[Where "Earth "Would be in this case]

Special Zone

Twilight cage

Shatterverse

New Yoke City

No Place

Boscage maze

The grim

Ghost Hill

Endless amounts of Zones, these are just the top 3...Make sure not to get lost
